transcript.text:
[Korea Volunteer Service Center]
Hello everyone, this is Tzuyang
We are all going through a hard time because of COVID-19
I can't be much of a help, but
I am here to volunteer service to be a help
[She is here to lend a helping hand]
Do you have anything to say?
Let's go!
[Creator Tzuyang] [COVID-19 related donations 20,000,000 Won (~$18,356 USD)]
I am so thankful for her to not only do community service for us
but also the funds that she donated in helping those affected by COVID-19]
We will make sure that everything you do will be sent over to them
We will do our best to send the love and support you're giving us
We will also do our best to do our parts to not let Tzuyang's support go to waste
Thank you
I'm here to make bento boxes

I heard that a lot of meal centers/food stamp places are closed due to covid
And a lot of funds are being cut for the low income
I can't meet them face-to-face, but I am here hoping to be a help
in making food
All the food that'll be packaged here
Will be sent over to Youngdeungpo Counseling Center/Shelter
Hello [Meeting the volunteers she will be working with today]
Even the ones volunteering need to take care of their health
We'll make sure to sanitize our hands, take our temperature,
Please know that we are doing our best to take precautions while we proceed with this
I hope that everyone finds good health as they go about their day
We are here to help those who are or feel excluded
I know that this pandemic affects/hits harder to those who are less fortunate
I just wanted to come help
1, 2, 3 Let's go!
[Time to make 100 bento boxes!]

Need to put on the gloves
[Get the rice cooking]
[Washing the ingredients]
We will all do what we can to help the ones in need
Hoping that everything would go back to how it was beffore
I don't have that much experience with cooking
But I will do everything I can to make it delicious
[Concentrated]
The fact that they are here
Sacrificing their own time to be here together
That alone deserves to be commended
Places like food stamps and meal centers do not have designated workers
and because if a lot of people are there, covid can get worse
So all those places are limiting workers at the moment
But there are still people that come out to help regardless of the situation just like Tzuyang
Even some medical personnel that visit the ones affected

[I believe that we will be able to overcome the crisis quickly thanks to these volunteers]
[Around 100 servings of fish cake]
[Around 100 servings of seaweed]
[Professional chef?]
We're done Now we need the sauce
Make the sauce?
[Found something to do before that]
[Moving the pot of bean sprouts]
[Very important to know where to stand]
[That's a lot of bean sprouts]
[Toss in the vegetables]
[Season it with salt and sesame oil]
Have a taste
How is it?
That's so good
[What's good!?]

That's really good
Thank you
Yum
Really..?
Is it good?
Don't doubt it
We made it
[Cooking the meat for the seaweed soup]
[Stirring the big pot]
[Broth that was made earlier]
[Pour]
She poured it without the filter
Mama-mia What shall we do?
We needed to filter it
That's a lot of anchovies
How did that happen?

[Picking out the chunks]
[Tzuyang is here making the sauce for the spicy pork]
5, 6,
11, 12
What? Did I do 12?
No, how many did you do?
Was it 18?
19, 20
I'm going to bring us some snack Tell me what you would like
I want an ice cream
I'll buy ice cream and drinks
Okay
[Making the spicy stir-fried pork]
My hands are freezing
[Help!]
[Peeling them apart]

[Need assistance?]
[Peeling together]
[We found the pro]
She's so good
She's a meat separater
Stop making me laugh
When did you start peeling frozen meat?
[Seasoning 100 servings of spicy pork]
Snacks have arrived
[She's in a hurry now]
Do you have to taste it?
Do you prefer meat or fat?
Both please
[Try it yourself]
That's good
[Sharing is caring]

Who made this delicious dish?
[Spicy Stir-Fried Pork is ready]
[They are all doing the spicy stir-fried pork now]
[It's getting stacked now]
It's the best
[Finishing up the last bits of it]
[Let's take a break now]
[Snack time after hard work]
It's exhausting, but we find happiness in that
It's fun
It's okay I'm not tired
It's really fun
[Time to package all the food]
[We will all get through this hard time together. We can do this!] -Korea Volunteer Ambassador Tzuyang
Awesome job today everyone
I believe that we can get through this hardship together

We can do it!
Thank you
This is going to be a huge help to the residents
Thank you
[I believe we will be able to get through all the tough times togehter] Subtitles by Hyun Choi antharoni@gmail.com
